result.summary: The page is generally well-structured, but several elements are cut off at the right edge of the viewport, suggesting horizontal clipping issues with carousels/scrollable rows that lack clear affordances. Overall 5 issues found: mostly major/minor layout and content truncation problems.

issues.description: Game thumbnails in the third column are cut off at the right edge of the screen (e.g., 'MAGNI... PHO...', 'MUNC... MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR... WATER'), with titles truncated and no visible scroll indicator.
issues.suggestion: Ensure carousel rows show a partial-card peek intentionally with a visible scroll affordance (arrow or gradient fade), or adjust card widths so full cards fit within the viewport.

issues.description: The 'Hot Gar...' navigation label in the top category bar is truncated (likely 'Hot Games'), making the label unclear.
issues.suggestion: Allow horizontal scrolling with a fade/arrow indicator, shorten labels, or wrap the category bar so full labels are visible.

issues.description: The promotional banner carousel's left/right arrows are low-contrast and partially blend into the banner imagery, making navigation controls hard to see.
issues.suggestion: Add a semi-transparent dark background or stronger contrast to the carousel arrows for better visibility.

issues.description: The last row of game thumbnails ('Millionaire', 'Rakin' Bacon', 'Dark Water') is vertically clipped by the bottom navigation bar, with cards abruptly cut off.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the content area so the last row isn't obscured by the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Jackpot amounts ($6,268.60, $13,015.68) overlay busy thumbnail artwork without a consistent background, reducing readability on some tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add a consistent semi-opaque dark strip or pill background behind jackpot amounts across all tiles.
